claims.summary: `dynamic_semantic_stale_ms_for` should return exact recovery ms at the recovery hold fill boundary.
claims.rationale: Existing tests assert the exact hold boundary and adjacent transition behavior for `STALE_SEMANTIC_RECOVERY_HOLD_FILL`.

claims.summary: Semantic context persistence should clamp to the max multiplier under simultaneous entropy, velocity, and pressure spikes.
claims.rationale: Existing tests assert that all-one entropy/velocity/pressure input clamps to `SEMANTIC_CONTEXT_PERSISTENCE_MAX_MULT`.

claims.summary: `SemanticStaleContextReviewV1` should expose stale-window policy and authority/audit fields.
claims.rationale: Source inspection verified `SemanticStaleContextReviewV1` and its review builder preserve policy and stale-window readout without changing live decay.
